title: Social Media Executive #F&B #Flexi-Location #Fun and growing brand
description:
Social Media Executive

We’re looking for a young, energetic, and switched-on Social Media Executive who lives and breathes content. If you’re always on your phone for the right reasons (trends, reels, edits, insights), this one’s for you.

What You’ll Do

  • Plan, create, and manage content across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Xiaohongshu, and other relevant platforms
  • Shoot and edit short videos, reels, and photos for social media (basic editing is sufficient,  polish matters more than fancy effects)
  • Stay on top of trends, hashtags, and platform updates and turn them into timely content
  • Write engaging captions and respond to comments/messages professionally
  • Support marketing campaigns, launches, and day-to-day brand storytelling
  • Work closely with owners and internal teams to align content with brand direction
  • Monitor various platforms reviews and manage with the Ops Team (Google , trip advisor etc)

What We’re Looking For

  • Young, energetic, and proactive
  • Familiar with all major social media platforms and how content performs differently on each
  • Comfortable with basic video and photo editing tools (e.g. CapCut, Canva, InShot, etc.)
  • Strong sense of visual aesthetics and storytelling
  • Able to communicate effectively in a bilingual working environment (to support daily coordination and content discussions)
  • Detail-oriented, fast-moving, and able to juggle multiple tasks without losing the plot

Bonus Points If You Have

  • Experience managing brand or business social media accounts
  • On-camera confidence or experience directing short-form videos
  • A good eye for food, lifestyle, or people-centric content

Why Join Us

  • Hands-on exposure to real brands, real growth, real decisions
  • Creative freedom with guidance (no micro-managing, no “post for the sake of posting”)
  • A fast-moving environment where good ideas actually get used

If content is your instinct and trends are your second language, this is your place.  Apply now and join us today!

postedCompany.description:
Join Our New Restaurant in Clarke Quay Central – Exciting Opportunities Available!

Our mission is to bring the rich, flavorful heritage cuisine to life with modern touches, offering a unique and unforgettable dining experience.

We are looking for passionate, dedicated, and customer-focused individuals to join our growing team. Whether you have a love for culinary arts, exceptional service skills, or a desire to contribute to an exciting new venture, we would love to hear from you.

Why Join Us?

Be part of a brand-new concept in one of Singapore's most iconic dining destinations.
Work with a dynamic, creative team committed to delivering excellence.
Opportunities for career growth in an exciting, fast-paced environment.
Competitive salary and benefits.
If you are eager to contribute to a restaurant that celebrates culture, creativity, and authentic flavors, come join us as we embark on this exciting culinary journey!
postedCompany.name: NEW ASIA LION CITY TRADING PTE. LTD.
